examples: The space telescope has taken the clearest pictures ever of Pluto.
Astronomers know that Pluto and Triton have nearly the same size, mass, and density.
The next breath you take could have come from beyond Pluto.
Unidentified Man: Is Neptune a planet, because everybody knows that Neptune's orbit is crossed by Pluto's.
The suburbs of the solar system are filled with small, icy objects, including Pluto.
